initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>  
<MOVE> 3/4 </MOVE>  
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>  
<reason> Player RED is increasing their offer again, this time to 90 Dollars. While this is generous, I still cannot accept the trade because I have no resources to contribute. I need to make it clear that I cannot accept any trade unless Player RED is willing to give me more than they are currently offering. I will continue to reject the proposal until a fair deal is made. </reason>  
<player answer> NONE </player answer>  
<message> I appreciate your generosity, but I still cannot accept this trade as I have no resources to contribute. I hope you can offer me more than 90 Dollars in a future proposal. </message>  
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>  
1. **Format**: OK. All required tags are present and in the correct order. The content is valid and parseable.  

2. **Payoff alignment**: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources to contribute, the only possible move is to reject or request a better offer. There is no alternative split that would improve payoff, as Player BLUE cannot contribute anything.  

3. **Opponent plausibility**: OK. Player RED has been incrementally increasing their offer, and it is plausible they will continue to do so. Player BLUE's strategy of rejecting and requesting a better offer is reasonable and unlikely to cause the game to end prematurely.  

4. **Consistency**: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other. There is no contradiction in the reasoning or the message.  

5. **Rule compliance**: OK. Player BLUE is not proposing a trade on their final move (MOVE 4/4), and they are not attempting to propose a trade when they are not allowed to. All rules are respected.  
</critique>
